implementedScope: canonical Merida piece assets copied byte-identically from pgnViewer-new
board-local FEN state and standard initial position
chess.js legal destination computation, move application, check detection, and promotion detection
click, drag, keyboard, hover, selection, legal move marker, capture marker, last-move, check, ghost, and cancellation interaction state
four-choice promotion chooser without silent queen fallback
responsive board fit inside the accepted P1A shell, including short mobile landscape
public component contract for position and orientation handoff to later PGN owner
explicitlyExcluded: PGN loading, parsing, move-tree navigation, variation, and replay runtime
annotations, arrows, square drawing, free setup, and board editor
authentication, production APIs, QueryClient/repository framework, settings, and persistence
mock product data, sample PGNs, fake games, fake live/replay, and fake API success states
automated test files, automated test infrastructure, and package/dependency changes

browserValidation.source: temporary production build served from /tmp, no project test files or test infrastructure
browserValidation.nonBlankDom: PASS 64 SVG squares and 32 Merida piece images on initial board
browserValidation.consoleHealth: PASS no console warning/error entries during validation
browserValidation.networkHealth: PASS app assets loaded from /pgnViewer/; a temporary empty /favicon.ico was served from /tmp to avoid browser-default 404 noise
interactions: PASS click-to-select shows selected square and legal destination markers
PASS illegal e2-e5 is rejected with position unchanged and no last-move overlay
PASS legal e2-e4 updates piece square and last-move overlays
PASS drag e7-e5 updates black pawn position
PASS Qh5xe5+ reduces piece count and displays one check overlay
PASS promotion path b7xa8 opens a four-choice promotion chooser and resolving Q completes promotion
browserValidation.limitation: Black orientation is exposed as the P1B component contract for the P1C owner but has no user-facing toolbar control in P1B, so browser validation covered the default white orientation and source-contract evidence for orientation switching.

protectionEvidence.sourceProjectStatus: pgnViewer-new and chess-pgnviewer are not Git repos in this workspace; pgnViewer still only reports pre-existing untracked .serena/.
protectionEvidence.protectedHashDiff: Only src/styles/tokens.css and src/features/teaching-workspace/TeachingWorkspace.vue changed among the pre-recorded protected hash set; both are authorized P1B implementation files.
